name: flight_search
description: Search for available flights between two cities on a specific date. Use this when the user asks about flights (e.g., '查询航班', '帮我查一下从北京到上海的航班', '有没有去上海的飞机'). Do not use this for: searching by flight number only, multi-city trips, or queries without a specific date. Returns flight details including flight number, departure/arrival times, airports, price, duration, aircraft type, and meal service. Results are sorted by price (lowest first). Returns an empty list if no flights match the criteria.

departure_date.description: Departure date in YYYY-MM-DD format. This is the date the flight departs (e.g., '2026-03-08' for March 8, 2026).

departure_city.description: Departure city name in Chinese as stored in the system (e.g., '北京市' or '北京', '上海市' or '上海', '深圳市' or '深圳'). Must match the city name exactly as it appears in the flight database.

destination_city.description: Destination city name in Chinese as stored in the system (e.g., '上海市' or '上海', '北京市' or '北京', '广州市' or '广州'). Must match the city name exactly as it appears in the flight database.
